subsidyType: city-managed full replacement program funded with grants and loans at no cost to customers in active project areas
publicSideCovered: yes the city replaces the public portion during the coordinated project
privateSideCovered: yes the city coordinates replacement of identified private-side lead lines at no cost in active project areas
propertyRules: property must be identified by the city's inspections records or letters and owners must sign right-of-entry authorization forms
contractorRules: city-selected contractors and licensed plumbers complete the replacement and post-replacement testing
